description.task: Build an ExpressionTree class where each internal node is an operator (+,-,*,/) and each leaf is an integer. Implement evaluate() to recursively compute the expression value, and infix() to produce the infix string with proper parentheses.
instructions: evaluate: use a switch on root.val: '+' return left+right; '-' return left-right; '*' return left*right; '/' return left/right
description.hint: evaluate switch: case '+': return left+right; case '-': return left-right; case '*': return left*right; case '/': return left/right; infix: return '('+infix(root.left)+root.val+infix(root.right)+')';

description.task: Implement a FileSystemTree using a tree structure where each node is a file or directory. Directories can have children; files cannot. Implement addChild, totalSize (sum of all file sizes), and printTree (indented hierarchy).
instructions: totalSize: if(!node.isDir) return node.size; int sum=0; for each child: sum+=totalSize(child); return sum
addChild and printTree are already implemented
File sizes: Main.java=1024, Utils.java=512, README.md=256; total=1792
printTree depth controls indentation (2 spaces per level)
description.hint: totalSize: if(!node.isDir) return node.size; int sum=0; for(FsNode c:node.children) sum+=totalSize(c); return sum;
description.expectedOutput:
root [DIR]
  src [DIR]
    Main.java [FILE 1024B]
    Utils.java [FILE 512B]
  README.md [FILE 256B]
Total size: 1792 bytes

description.task: Implement a Trie class that supports insert, search (exact match), startsWith (prefix check), and autocomplete (list all words with a given prefix). Each TrieNode has an array of 26 children and an isEnd flag.
instructions: search: traverse for each char; if any char's child is null return false; after loop return curr.isEnd
startsWith: same traversal but return false only if a char's child is null; return true if full prefix traversed
autocomplete: traverse to prefix node (already done above TODO); then call dfs(curr, prefix, results) to collect all words
autocomplete('app') → [app, apple, apply] (sorted alphabetically by DFS left-to-right)
description.hint: search: TrieNode curr=root; for(char c:word.toCharArray()){int i=c-'a'; if(curr.children[i]==null)return false; curr=curr.children[i];} return curr.isEnd; autocomplete: call dfs(curr,prefix,results);
